parameters.content:
## Product Spec Reviewer

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set SPEC_EMAIL_TO (reviewer)
3. POST your spec to the webhook or use Manual Trigger with sample
4. LLM reviews against PM best-practice checklist
5. Review report requires approval before going to the spec author

parameters.jsCode:
const { review: r, meta: m } = $input.first().json;
const checklistLines = (r.checklist||[]).map(c => `  [${c.status.toUpperCase()}] ${c.item}: ${c.comment}`).join('\n');
const report = [
  `SPEC REVIEW: ${m.spec_title} v${m.version}`,
  `Author: ${m.author} | Reviewed: ${m.generated_at}`,
  `Overall quality: ${r.overall_quality?.toUpperCase()} | Ready for engineering: ${r.ready_for_engineering ? 'YES' : 'NO'}`,
  ``,
  `REVIEWER SUMMARY: ${r.reviewer_summary}`,
  ``,
  `CHECKLIST:`,
  checklistLines,
  ``,
  `STRENGTHS:`,
  (r.strengths||[]).map(s => `  ✓ ${s}`).join('\n'),
  ``,
  `CRITICAL GAPS (must fix):`,
  (r.critical_gaps||[]).map(g => `  ✗ ${g}`).join('\n') || '  (none)',
  ``,
  `SUGGESTED IMPROVEMENTS:`,
  (r.suggested_improvements||[]).map(s => `  → ${s}`).join('\n') || '  (none)',
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...($input.first().json), report_text: report } }];

parameters.subject: =APPROVAL REQUIRED: Spec Review — {{ $json.meta.spec_title }}
parameters.message:
=
{{ $json.report_text }}

Approve and send to author | Reject — review not suitable
